scenes.description: Bijou addresses the audience after her performance and prepares to teleport back home.
The teleportation process glitches, scattering coins and pulling Bijou elsewhere.
Bijou finds herself in an arcade-themed world and decides to follow the game logic.
Bijou enters a new stage and encounters an unexpected challenger.
Robocosan reveals she is a Game Master and challenges Bijou to a battle for the coin.

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: How was that? That was the best performance ever, right?
subtitles.english: How was that? That was the best performance ever, right?

subtitles.original: Hey over there!
subtitles.english: Hey over there!

subtitles.original: You liked it, right? Hey!
subtitles.english: You liked it, right? Hey!

subtitles.original: With this I should be able to get back to my own world.
subtitles.english: With this I should be able to get back to my own world.

subtitles.original: Alright, I'm ready! Beam me up Pebbles!
subtitles.english: Alright, I'm ready! Beam me up Pebbles!

subtitles.original: Ah! Ah! Why isn't it working?
subtitles.english: Ah! Ah! Why isn't it working?

subtitles.original: No!
subtitles.english: No!

subtitles.original: The coins!
subtitles.english: The coins!

subtitles.original: Where are you going?
subtitles.english: Where are you going?

subtitles.original: Dang it.
subtitles.english: Dang it.

subtitles.original: Well, according to video game logic, this must mean
subtitles.english: Well, according to video game logic, this must mean

subtitles.original: I must now go on an epic quest to find the coins or something.
subtitles.english: I must now go on an epic quest to find the coins or something.

subtitles.original: But I don't have time for that!
subtitles.english: But I don't have time for that!

subtitles.original: I need the coins back to get home! No!
subtitles.english: I need the coins back to get home! No!

subtitles.original: Huh? Huh?
subtitles.english: Huh? Huh?

subtitles.original: Oh, what's this?
subtitles.english: Oh, what's this?

subtitles.original: Uh, I mean, I came out through there, so maybe
subtitles.english: Uh, I mean, I came out through there, so maybe

subtitles.original: this will take me, you know, on my next step of my quest?
subtitles.english: this will take me, you know, on my next step of my quest?

subtitles.original: Well, better than being stuck here. So...
subtitles.english: Well, better than being stuck here. So...

subtitles.original: Let's go!
subtitles.english: Let's go!

subtitles.original: Ah! No... uh...
subtitles.english: Ah! No... uh...

subtitles.original: Huh? Huh? I'm not back in my world?
subtitles.english: Huh? Huh? I'm not back in my world?

subtitles.original: え、ここどこ？
subtitles.english: Wait, where am I?

subtitles.original: 待ってたよ、ビブー。
subtitles.english: I've been waiting for you, Biboo.

subtitles.original: Robocosan Joins the Battle! Fighting Game Battle
subtitles.english: Robocosan Joins the Battle! Fighting Game Battle

subtitles.original: Eh? Eh? Roboco-senpai?
subtitles.english: Eh? Eh? Roboco-senpai?

subtitles.original: 探しているのは...これ？
subtitles.english: Is this what you're looking for?

subtitles.original: Ah! Coin, the coin!
subtitles.english: Ah! Coin, the coin!

subtitles.original: MISSION: Reclaim the scattered coins from each stage's Game Master!
subtitles.english: MISSION: Reclaim the scattered coins from each stage's Game Master!

subtitles.original: これがないと元の世界に戻れないんでしょ？
subtitles.english: You can't get back to your original world without this, right?

subtitles.original: でもそうはさせない。
subtitles.english: But I won't let that happen.

subtitles.original: ゲームマスターである僕たちから全て取り戻せるかな？
subtitles.english: Can you take them all back from us Game Masters?

subtitles.original: Eh? Honto? I don't know... Eh? Uh... Ah!
subtitles.english: Eh? Really? I don't know... Eh? Uh... Ah!

subtitles.original: と、とにかくこのコインが欲しければ...
subtitles.english: Anyway, if you want this coin...

subtitles.original: 僕と...勝負だ！
subtitles.english: you'll have to... battle me!

subtitles.original: A match?
subtitles.english: A match?

subtitles.original: そう、yes! 格闘ゲームで勝負だ！
subtitles.english: Right, yes! Let's battle in a fighting game!

subtitles.original: Alright, I won't lose! Let's go!
subtitles.english: Alright, I won't lose! Let's go!

subtitles.original: リモコン Lyrics, Music: じーざす
subtitles.english: Remote Control Lyrics, Music: Jesus-P

subtitles.english: This is the machine that

subtitles.english: controls me remotely

subtitles.original: 少し歪な形しておりますが
subtitles.english: It's a bit of an odd shape,

subtitles.original: 使えます
subtitles.english: but it works

subtitles.original: 伝わる 伝わる sit down please
subtitles.english: Communicating, communicating, sit down please

subtitles.original: フィードバックに体預けて
subtitles.english: Surrender your body to the feedback

subtitles.original: めぐる めぐる turn around
subtitles.english: Going 'round and 'round, turn around

subtitles.original: うなりを上げて 朦朧状態
subtitles.english: Raising a roar into a hazy state

subtitles.original: 踊る 踊る dancing night
subtitles.english: Dancing, dancing, dancing night

subtitles.original: マッシュアップでもれなくアガる
subtitles.english: Getting pumped up with a mashup

subtitles.english: Go-way, raise it up, singing now

subtitles.english: I want to sing better than that girl

subtitles.original: これが僕をリモートで
subtitles.english: This is the machine that

subtitles.original: 操縦できる機械です
subtitles.english: can operate me remotely
